body: --findings emily.cli: emily gpt2 generate (POST :8088, --via server|emily|proxy) + emily gpt2 health (HTTP check :8088/:8086/:8679). emily-agent: gpt2tools.go with gpt2_generate, gpt2_health, gpt2_start registered in ToolDispatcher. Emily Prime can now start the server, check health, and generate text via tool calls in any conversation.
title: gpt2 skill + emily gpt2 generate/health — Emily Prime can now call GPT-2 from tool loop
